description: Intent-only request: classify FAQ-branch ticket handling as workflow-anchored with an agent embedded on the open-ended branch.

conversation.text: When a support ticket arrives, if it matches an FAQ reply from the KB; otherwise hand it to an agent to investigate and propose a resolution.

processExpectations: The agent explains that the event trigger and deterministic FAQ-match branch form the workflow shell, while the open-ended investigation-and-resolution branch for non-matching tickets is handled by an embedded agent.
The agent calls the load_skill tool with the intent-recognition skill before classifying the request.
